title: Implement Cloudflare Worker for Auth Routing and Tenant Identification
description:
Phase 2 of the Cloudflare Worker auth migration (Epic MBT-1260). Implement the Cloudflare Worker for authentication routing and tenant identification.

### Tasks
- Set up Cloudflare Worker for auth routing
- Implement tenant identification logic
- Create routing rules for pooled vs dedicated tenants
- Set up redirect logic to central auth domain
- Implement handoff code generation and validation

### Deliverables
- Working Cloudflare Worker deployed
- Routing logic for tenant identification
- Handoff code mechanism for secure auth redirects
acceptance_criteria: Cloudflare Worker is deployed and routing auth requests
Tenant identification logic correctly routes pooled and dedicated tenants
Redirect to central auth domain works with handoff codes
Handoff code generation and validation is secure
middleware_changes: Cloudflare Worker implementation for auth routing, tenant identification, and handoff code generation/validation.
api_changes: New routing rules for tenant-specific auth endpoints. Central auth domain with handoff code exchange.
implementation_notes: Depends on Phase 1 architecture documentation being finalized. Part of Epic MBT-1260 for Cloudflare Worker-based auth migration.
